title: gazania pectinata
intro: Gazania pectinata, also known as the 'Pink Buttons' or 'Gazania', is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Gazania pectinata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
